title: bidens polylepis
intro: Bidens polylepis, also known as Polylepis leaf or Bidens, is a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Bidens polylepis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Bidens polylepis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties.
